Localization.Description: An attempt to use code execution or lateral movement by changing a system service startup command is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to use code execution on host {event_src.host} by changing the startup command for the '{datafield5}' service is detected
An attempt to use lateral movement from host {src.host} ({src.ip}) to host {dst.host} ({dst.ip}) by changing the startup command for the '{datafield5}' service is detected
